name: Armani Beauty Dolci Makeup Blush Pop-Up

fields.address: W 14th St & 9th Ave, New York, NY 10014
fields.short_description: One-day Armani beauty pop-up with makeup artistry, a photo booth, café treats, and a free full-size Dolci blush to take home.

fields.address: 245 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002
fields.short_description: Step into an immersive 1930s diner where food, music, and storytelling revisit the moment the modern pay cycle was born.
Sip complimentary coffee and tea, watch brewer demos, and match a drink to your mood at Flavia's two-day SoHo lounge.

name: Liquid IV x Spider-Man Brand New Day Wall Crawl

fields.short_description: Scale a Spider-Man wall crawl in Domino Park, hydrate with Liquid I.V., and support disaster-relief heroes.

name: Odd One In Taste of Love Pop-Up

fields.short_description: File a summer crush, meet your Hanhan match, and hunt collectibles at this interactive Taste of Love pop-up shop.

fields.address: E 14th St & 3rd Ave, New York, NY 10003
fields.short_description: Headspace takes over a newsstand with a free special-edition paper of mindful games and puzzles — all fun, no news.
Open-air body-care pop-up with complimentary coffee, first looks at new launches, and samples of UNI bestsellers.
Free ranger-led archery lessons in parks across the city — all equipment and instruction provided, no RSVP needed.

name: Budgie Landing at the Bronx Zoo

fields.short_description: Feed free-flying budgies from a seed stick inside the Bronx Zoo's colorful summer aviary.

name: Free Garden Tours at the Met Cloisters

fields.address: 99 Margaret Corbin Dr, New York, NY 10040
fields.short_description: Wander medieval gardens and learn the medicinal, artistic, and magical uses of their plants on a daily guided tour.

fields.address: 10 Lincoln Center Plaza, New York, NY 10023
fields.short_description: Catch jazz, R&B, musical theater, and orchestral shows at Lincoln Center's iconic venues from just $5.

fields.address: 99 Margaret Corbin Dr, New York, NY 10040
fields.short_description: Drop into artist-led demos and hands-on art-making at the Cloisters — all materials provided, all ages welcome.
MoMA stays open late every Friday with free admission for New York State residents, plus galleries and drawing sessions.
Free Friday evenings at the Whitney with art, drinks, music, and skyline views — advance tickets recommended.

name: World Cup Watch Parties at Louis Armstrong Stadium

fields.short_description: Watch World Cup matches on the big screen at Louis Armstrong Stadium with performances, local food, and global fans.
